name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..5 |-> 0]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state[1] = 0
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ state[1] = 1
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = 2]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ state[1] = 2
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = 3]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ state[1] = 3
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = 4]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ state[1] = 4
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = 5]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ state[1] = 5
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages



TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"INIT", "PREPARING", "COMMITTING", "ABORTING", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
  /\ messages \in [1..N -> {"", "PREPARE", "VOTE_YES", "VOTE_NO", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}]

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "INIT"]
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]

Next ==
  \/ /\ coordinator = "INIT"
     /\ coordinator' = "PREPARING"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "PREPARE"]
  \/ /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
     /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "VOTE_YES"
     /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTING"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "COMMIT"]
  \/ /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "VOTE_NO"
     /\ coordinator' = "ABORTING"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "ABORT"]
  \/ /\ coordinator = "COMMITTING"
     /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "COMMIT"
     /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTED"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]
  \/ /\ coordinator = "ABORTING"
     /\ \A i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "ABORT"
     /\ coordinator' = "ABORTED"
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "PREPARE"
     /\ participants[i] = "INIT"
     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "PREPARED"]
     /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![i] = "VOTE_YES"]
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "PREPARE"
     /\ participants[i] = "INIT"
     /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![i] = "VOTE_NO"]
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "COMMIT"
     /\ participants[i] = "PREPARED"
     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "COMMITTED"]
     /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![i] = ""]
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages[i] = "ABORT"
     /\ participants[i] = "PREPARED"
     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "ABORTED"]
     /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![i] = ""]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: a set of fork indices {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Forks == {1, 2, ..., N}

(* State: a function mapping philosopher indices to their state *)
State == [p \in Forks |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial condition: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ state = [p \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions to get adjacent fork indices *)
LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

(* Predicate: philosopher p is hungry and both adjacent forks are free *)
HungryAndFree(p) == state[p] = "hungry" /\ LeftFork(p) \in forks /\ RightFork(p) \in forks

(* Action: philosopher p picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(p) == forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(p), RightFork(p)} /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher p puts down both forks and starts thinking *)
PutForks(p) == forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(p), RightFork(p)} /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry *)
Hungry(p) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"] /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry; any hungry philosopher with free forks can start eating; any eating philosopher can finish eating *)
Next == \E p \in Forks :
          (Hungry(p) \/ (HungryAndFree(p) /\ TakeForks(p)) \/ (state[p] = "eating" /\ PutForks(p)))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks; state is a function from Forks to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == forks \subseteq Forks /\ state \in State

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag



Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ \A j \in 1..N :
            flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Producer(x) == /\ size < K
              /\ q[tail] = x
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head>>

Consumer(y) == /\ size > 0
              /\ y = q[head]
              /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
              /\ size' = size - 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

Next == \E x \in 1..K : Producer(x) \/ \E y \in 1..K : Consumer(y)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ K > 0
          /\ q \in [1..K -> 1..K]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
